description: Tween Value is a node that allows you to change a Target (Numeric or Enum IField`1) over a Duration (float) from a starting point to an ending point. The different curve presets determine the interpolation used, and when applicable will smoothly change using non whole numbers.

fields.* ([[Impulses#Async|AsyncCall]]): Tells the node to start tweening Target (Numeric or Enum IField`1).
fields.To:
The value to tween towards over Duration (float)

Examples: Key Enum, Float, Int, etc
fields.From:
The value to tween away from over Duration (float)

Examples: Key Enum, Float, Int, etc
fields.Duration: The duration in seconds that the value should tween for.
fields.Curve: The interpolation type to use while tweening.
fields.ProportionalDuration: If true, multiplies the duration of the tween by the distance between the two endpoints, making the average speed over the whole tween equal to 1.
fields.Target: The value this node should Tween.
fields.OnStarted: Sends an Async Impulse once the node starts tweening the Target (Numeric or Enum IField`1).
fields.OnDone: Sends an Impulse once the node is done tweening Target (Numeric or Enum IField`1).
